messages.message: Unexpected unlimited 'eslint-disable' comment. Specify some rule names to disable.

suppressedMessages.message: 'cols' is already declared in the upper scope on line 4 column 9.
'i' is already declared in the upper scope on line 166 column 13.

messages.message: Do not define components during render. React will see a new component type on every render and destroy the entire subtree’s DOM nodes and state (https://reactjs.org/docs/reconciliation.html#elements-of-different-types). Instead, move this component definition out of the parent component “OwnerTabs” and pass data as props. If you want to allow component creation in props, set allowAsProps option to true.

Do not define components during render. React will see a new component type on every render and destroy the entire subtree’s DOM nodes and state (https://reactjs.org/docs/reconciliation.html#elements-of-different-types). Instead, move this component definition out of the parent component “PlayerTabs” and pass data as props. If you want to allow component creation in props, set allowAsProps option to true.
